title: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva becomes president of Brazil
fact: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, known mononymously as Lula, is a Brazilian politician, trade unionist and former metalworker who has served as president of Brazil since 2023.

title: Jair Bolsonaro becomes president of Brazil
fact: Jair Messias Bolsonaro is a Brazilian politician and former military officer who served as the 38th president of Brazil from 2019 to 2023.
